# resnet_Orin 3rdparty Placeholder

This directory is intentionally tracked as an app-local dependency entry for
`resnet_Orin`.

Do not commit large binary dependencies here. Populate it locally with real
directories or symlinks such as:

- `opencv/`
- `cuda/`
- `tensorrt/`
- `models/`

You can prepare the expected layout with:

```bash
bash /workspace/zjx/GryFlux/src/app/resnet_Orin/scripts/setup_local_3rdparty_links.sh
```
